values.title: Full Home Refurbishment
values.summary: Layout changes · Kitchen · Bathroom · Decorating · Carpentry
values.description:
This tired three-bedroom Victorian terrace was reconfigured from top to bottom to suit modern family life.

We reworked the ground-floor layout, installed a new kitchen and bathroom, and finished throughout with bespoke carpentry and a full redecoration.
values.deliveredSummary: A complete refurbishment delivered on a fixed price and to programme.

values.title: Open-Plan Kitchen Extension
values.summary: Howdens supply-and-install · Structural opening · Underfloor heating
values.description:
A dark galley kitchen was transformed into a bright open-plan kitchen-diner opening onto the garden.

We formed a structural opening, laid underfloor heating and fitted a new kitchen with quartz worktops.
values.deliveredSummary: A structural kitchen extension completed in five weeks.

values.title: Victorian Terrace Bathroom
values.summary: Full strip-out · Wetroom-style shower · Custom tiling · New layout
values.description:
A cramped, dated family bathroom was rebuilt as a calm wetroom with a walk-in shower.

We stripped back to brick, re-planned the layout and finished with floor-to-ceiling porcelain tiling.
values.deliveredSummary: A full bathroom rebuild delivered in three weeks.

values.title: Recent work in North London
values.description: A selection of bathrooms, kitchens and refurbishments delivered across Islington and nearby areas.

children.text: "Communication was excellent throughout—we always knew what was happening. The team was respectful of our home and left it spotless each day. The bathroom looks incredible."
"We had a full kitchen and bathroom done together. The programme was well organised with clear milestones. The team was punctual, clean and professional throughout."
"The quote was detailed and upfront—no hidden costs. Project came in on time and on budget. The engineering approach really shows in the quality of the finish. Highly recommend."

children.text: We lead with quality project work.
Smaller repairs are also available for existing clients and local residents.

values.title: A local team you can trust

children.text: We're a family-run, owner-led team based in Islington. We specialise in bathroom renovations, kitchen installations and full home refurbishments—delivering calm, organised projects for busy homeowners who want the job done properly.

From the first site visit to finishing touches, we manage the programme, coordinate trades, and keep communication clear. Smaller repairs and maintenance are also available for local clients who value a reliable team.

Upper Street Contracts is led by a civil engineer with a background in construction management and project delivery. That experience shapes how we work: clear planning, realistic timelines, consistent site standards, and accountability throughout.
We're not trying to be the biggest builder in London—we focus on reliable execution, high-quality workmanship, and the kind of communication you'd expect from a professional team.
Multi-room refurbishments and reconfigurations, delivered by an in-house team with structured project management.
High-quality installation, waterproofing, tiling, plumbing and electrics—managed end to end.
Supply-and-install or fit-only, with coordinated electrics, plumbing, carpentry and finishing.

values.title: Loft Conversion with Ensuite
values.summary: Rear dormer · Ensuite shower room · New staircase · Velux roof lights
values.description:
An unused loft became a light-filled master suite with its own ensuite.

We built a rear dormer, added a new staircase and fitted an ensuite shower room, all signed off to building regulations.
values.deliveredSummary: A dormer loft conversion with ensuite, delivered to building regs.

values.title: Two-Storey Side Return Extension
values.summary: Side return extension · Structural works · Full internal refit
values.description:
A double-height side return extension added significant space across two floors.

The project combined structural works, a new kitchen and a full internal refit throughout the house.
values.deliveredSummary: A major two-storey extension delivered over fourteen weeks.

values.title: Family Bathroom Refresh
values.summary: New suite · Retiling · Improved lighting · Quick turnaround
values.description:
A fast, well-organised refresh brought a dated family bathroom up to date.

We replaced the suite, retiled throughout and improved the lighting and ventilation in two weeks.
values.deliveredSummary: A tidy bathroom refresh completed in two weeks.

values.title: Shaker Kitchen Renovation
values.summary: Shaker units · Quartz worktops · New appliances · Rewire
values.description:
A classic Shaker kitchen was installed as part of a wider ground-floor refresh.

We fitted new units and quartz worktops, integrated appliances and completed a partial rewire.
values.deliveredSummary: A Shaker kitchen renovation delivered over six weeks.

values.title: Period Loft & Roofline Restoration
values.summary: Loft conversion · Roofline restoration · Insulation upgrade
values.description:
A period property gained a new loft room alongside a sympathetic roofline restoration.

We converted the loft, restored the roofline in keeping with the conservation area and upgraded insulation throughout.
values.deliveredSummary: A loft conversion and roofline restoration delivered over nine weeks.
